title: Crumbly French Rice Cakes (Indian-Style)
description: A unique fusion of Indian flavors with French crumbly rice cakes, perfect for a snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: Xenial crumbly mixture
ingredients.notes: You can make your own crumbly mixture using crushed biscuits or crackers.

ingredients.name: Cuisine-specific spices
ingredients.notes: Use a combination of Indian spices like cumin, coriander, and garam masala.

instructions: In a bowl, mix together the French rice, crumbly mixture, and spices.
Add salt to taste and mix well.
Heat the ghee or oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the rice mixture and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish and shape into desired forms.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly golden.
Allow the cakes to cool before serving.
